subcodes.first_line: O faithful friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Mr. and Mrs. Bush have arrived in the Holy Land and brought joyous tidings [3.5s]... ...O ye beloved of the Lord! In this mortal world, nothing whatsoever endureth. The peoples of the earth
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران باوفای عبدالبهاء مستر و مسیس بوش بارض مقدس وارد شدند و ارمغان خوشی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
